args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessed as high. Session-fixation flaw in token refresh path affecting auth-api and session-store services.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
The patch window for CVE-2026-30117 has been confirmed. The following services will be patched:

- auth-api to v5.8.4
- session-store to v2.2.9

Patching will proceed immediately.

args.text: Both services patched and verified. auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete. Both affected services have been deployed and verified:

- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Proceeding with credential rotation and session re-establishment.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: (1) all active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) signing keys rotated, (3) old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: Following tonight's security maintenance to address CVE-2026-30117, all staff sessions have been invalidated for security purposes. Please sign in again to establish new sessions.
